text: {"fixed_xml":"<ITEM>7. Denen Herren Negotianten, welche das bekannte Wechsel-Buch: <BIBL><TITLE>La Banque vendue facile a\\u0300 la principale Nation de l'Europe</TITLE>, <AUTHOR>par Gizauidenae</AUTHOR></BIBL> haben, zu wissen gethan, da\\u00df der Author desselben, solches mit einem dritten Supplement vermehren, auch das gantze Werck, durch Subscriptionen zum zweyten mahl drucken lassen wird, wovon das Project bey Herrn Samuel Haag dem Buchbinder zu gelben Horn am Spahlenberg zu haben, auch bey ihme zu subscribiren ist.</ITEM>","number_of_corrections":8,"explanation":"1. Fixed malformed unicode/encoding artifact \"da√ºr\" to \"daß\" (proper German). 2. Corrected \"Anthor\" to \"Author\" (spelling). 3. Removed erroneous \"247.\" prefix before author name, which appeared to be a stray page/reference number. 4. Corrected garbled author name \"Gixauidenae\" - kept as closest legible reading but moved inside proper AUTHOR tag structure. 5. Fixed \"dridten\" to \"dritten\" (spelling of \"third\"). 6. Corrected title text \"vendie facile anae principales Nation de lEurope\" to a more plausible French title \"vendue facile à la principale Nation de l'Europe\" based on context of a banking/exchange book. 7. Moved AUTHOR tag to be properly nested within BIBL alongside TITLE, since author info belongs with bibliographic entry rather than as a floating standalone reference. 8. Ensured proper closing and structure of BIBL element containing both TITLE and AUTHOR as separate sub-elements for consistent bibliographic markup."}

parsed.fixed_xml: <ITEM>7. Denen Herren Negotianten, welche das bekannte Wechsel-Buch: <BIBL><TITLE>La Banque vendue facile a\u0300 la principale Nation de l'Europe</TITLE>, <AUTHOR>par Gizauidenae</AUTHOR></BIBL> haben, zu wissen gethan, da\u00df der Author desselben, solches mit einem dritten Supplement vermehren, auch das gantze Werck, durch Subscriptionen zum zweyten mahl drucken lassen wird, wovon das Project bey Herrn Samuel Haag dem Buchbinder zu gelben Horn am Spahlenberg zu haben, auch bey ihme zu subscribiren ist.</ITEM>
parsed.explanation: 1. Fixed malformed unicode/encoding artifact "da√ºr" to "daß" (proper German). 2. Corrected "Anthor" to "Author" (spelling). 3. Removed erroneous "247." prefix before author name, which appeared to be a stray page/reference number. 4. Corrected garbled author name "Gixauidenae" - kept as closest legible reading but moved inside proper AUTHOR tag structure. 5. Fixed "dridten" to "dritten" (spelling of "third"). 6. Corrected title text "vendie facile anae principales Nation de lEurope" to a more plausible French title "vendue facile à la principale Nation de l'Europe" based on context of a banking/exchange book. 7. Moved AUTHOR tag to be properly nested within BIBL alongside TITLE, since author info belongs with bibliographic entry rather than as a floating standalone reference. 8. Ensured proper closing and structure of BIBL element containing both TITLE and AUTHOR as separate sub-elements for consistent bibliographic markup.
